## What

One or two sentences describing the proposed change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Who is asking, and what is the user value?

## Proposed approach

How would this work? Optional; reviewers may suggest alternatives.

## Out of scope

What this is NOT. Helps prevent scope creep.
